title.romaji: Inazuma Eleven: Soushuuhen - Densetsu no Kickoff
title.english: Inazuma Eleven Movie: The Legendary Kickoff
title.native: イナズマイレブン総集編 伝説のキックオフ
synonyms: Eiga Inazuma Eleven: Soushuuhen Densetsu no Kickoff
Eiga Inazuma Eleven Soushuuhen Densetsu no Kickoff
Inazuma Eleven The Movie: Legendary Kickoff

synopsis:
This is a compilation of the matches from Inazuma Eleven Football Frontier, the first game in the Inazuma Eleven series.
The Raimon Junior High soccer team, led by the protagonist Endou Mamoru, aims to win the national tournament, Football Frontier.
Thanks to the efforts of legendary striker Gouenji Shuya, who joins the team, they beat strong schools and make it through the regional qualifiers despite fierce battles. With their former rival, Teikoku Gakuen's genius game maker Kidou Arihito, now on board, Raimon Junior High School advances to the finals, but they are faced with the overwhelming strength of Zeus Junior High!

(Source: Official Website)
